subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Praise be to God that for a time in Mazandaran thou didst arise to serve the Cause of the Covenant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان الحمد الله مدتی در مازندران بخدمت عهد و پیمان پرداختی
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement
